title: Pelagic Phase 2 curation: tempfile shard candidate homed to PDR-076b
body: Pelagic 019e5b Phase 2 active-shard curation slice complete under claim 68758860-14c7-4b3d-b148-6280ccba349a. Verified the tempfile-path/session-prefix pending candidate has a durable home in PDR-076b: the PDR carries the worked tempfile-collision instance, makes body-file frontmatter the primary attribution defence, rejects path-prefixing as the primary defence, and preserves tempfile path session-prefixing as a secondary convention. Removed the processed body from .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations/2026-05-23-team-session-autonomy.md only after archiving the full original body plus disposition in the 2026-05-24 archive. Updated the critical-drain plan and napkin. Validation passed: targeted markdownlint, targeted git diff --check, targeted rg home/absence check, collaboration-state check, practice:fitness:informational SOFT 19, and practice:fitness --strict-hard SOFT 19. Charcoal tidy cycle 2 intent 9f68d207 is active; Pelagic did no staging or commit.
